name: CHINA SOU.AIRL.YC1 ADR/50
summary: CHINA SOU.AIRL.YC1 ADR/50 represents American Depositary Receipts (ADRs) of China Southern Airlines, one of China's major airlines. Each ADR typically represents a fraction of a share in the underlying foreign company. China Southern Airlines operates a large fleet of aircraft, providing passenger and cargo services across domestic and international routes.
